label: Color Quest
description: Receives a color sequence via ESP-NOW; player must find and tap matching NFC tags in order.

label: Freeze Dance
description: Multiplayer motion game: dance when the music plays, freeze when it stops. Get caught moving and you're out until you rejoin.

label: Jump In
description: Press the button to blink all LEDs green. A simple entry game for testing wand response.

label: Cooking
description: Tap ingredient NFC tags to collect them. Hold the button to preview the recipe result.

label: Melody Builder
description: Scan note tags to build a melody, tap erase to clear, press button to play back.

label: Shake Fill
description: Shake the wand harder to light more LEDs on the matrix. Level only goes up. Press button to reset.

label: Shake Rainbow
description: Shake to climb through rainbow colors on the LED matrix. Color only advances. Press button to reset.

label: Rainbow Show
description: Shows battery level on the LED matrix, then a static rainbow pattern.

label: Jump Counter
description: Each jump lights one more LED on the matrix. Press button to reset.

label: Bell Choir
description: Each wand gets a random note. Hold the button to ring your bell and show your note color.

label: NFC Bell Choir
description: Scan note NFC tags to pick your bell. Hold button to play your note.

label: Simple Ice Cream
description: Press the button to count scoops while upright, then flip upside-down to reveal your ice cream color.

label: Multi Ice Cream
description: Build up to three scoops: count button presses upright, flip to commit each scoop.

label: Gestures
description: Train wand motions by color, then hold the button to classify gestures against what you taught.

label: Stop
description: Stops the current wand game and returns to idle mode.

label: Ask Device Status
description: Briefly wakes every wand to report battery & signal (~7 s).
